Scholarships

Students who apply for intra-institutional or inter-institutional transfer with a central placement score or Weighted Grade Point Average (GPA) benefit from 50% scholarship if they have a score equal to the 50% scholarship base score of the University Entrance Scholarship in the score type of the program they apply for, 50% scholarship if it is equal to the 100% scholarship base score, and 50% scholarship and preference scholarship rates.
